## Checklist
- [ ] Branch off `main`; Conventional Commit messages; atomic commits
- [ ] `scripts/lint.sh` and `scripts/test.sh` pass locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` (or `changelog: none` label)
- [ ] Non-trivial: plan in `docs/plans/` has a Codex review appendix, blockers resolved
- [ ] Docs / ADRs updated if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets; `offline/` not referenced by code or CI
